entities.name: ROCKFELLER FOUNDATION
entities.description: A philanthropic organization that provided the auspices for the establishment of ICRISAT and collaborated in assembling crop germplasm

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: An international agricultural research center established with the support of the Rockefeller Foundation

entities.name: CROP GERMPLASM
entities.description: Genetic resources of crops, specifically the first 8,961 accessions provided to ICRISAT in 1974

entities.name: INDIAN COUNCIL OF AGRICULTURAL RESEARCH
entities.description: An agricultural research organization in India that collaborated with the Rockefeller Foundation to assemble crop germplasm

entities.name: NEW DELHI
entities.description: The city where the Indian Council of Agricultural Research is located

relationships.description: Associated since genesis and provided the auspices for its establishment
Assembled the first accessions of crop germplasm for ICRISAT
Received its first 8,961 accessions of crop germplasm
Collaborated to assemble crop germplasm accessions
